backend/main.mo: Empty actor definition serving as the main backend entry point.
backend/studySession.mo: Module defining the StudySession type with start/end times, completion status, and optional chapter ID.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features related to investigating and fixing an unresponsive account creation button in the frontend.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes using warm earthy tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Tracky application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component with authentication-based routing, backend availability alert, and layout containing timer, quotes, streaks, chapters, history, and statistics components.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Authentication button component with console logging that displays login/logout buttons with loading states.
frontend/src/components/ChapterManager.t: Chapter management component with CRUD operations, completion tracking, progress statistics, inline forms, and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/DailyQuote.tsx: Card component displaying a daily motivational quote with icon and author attribution using gradient styling.
frontend/src/components/PomodoroTimer.ts: Pomodoro timer component with chapter selection dropdown, play/pause/reset controls, progress bar, and display of work/break durations.
frontend/src/components/SessionHistory.t: Displays a filterable list of completed study sessions with total time and session count statistics. Supports filtering by chapter and shows session details including duration and associated chapters.
frontend/src/components/SessionHistoryIt: Renders an individual study session item showing date, time range, duration in minutes, and associated chapter information with icons.
frontend/src/components/StatisticsDashbo: Displays comprehensive study statistics including total time, average session length, chapter completion progress, and integrates StudyChart for visualizations.
frontend/src/components/StreakDisplay.ts: Shows the current study streak count in days with a flame icon in a gradient card.
frontend/src/components/StudyChart.tsx: Provides tabbed visualizations of study data including time trends (daily/weekly bar charts), session distribution, chapter-based time/session counts (pie charts), and chapter completion progress.
frontend/src/components/TimerSettings.ts: Allows users to configure work and break durations (1-90 minutes) with validation and persistence via API mutations.
frontend/src/data/motivationalQuotes.ts: Exports an array of motivational quotes with text and author properties for display in the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides login and logout functionality by coordinating Internet Identity authentication with backend actor methods, invalidating all app queries on auth state changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyQuote.ts: Returns a deterministic daily motivational quote based on the current date, cycling through a predefined list of quotes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication provider using @dfinity/auth-client, managing identity state, login/logout flows, and delegation validation with React context.
frontend/src/hooks/usePomodoro.ts: Implements Pomodoro timer logic with work/break modes, integrating with backend to track study sessions and chapter selection, using user settings for durations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend operations including streak tracking, session history, settings management, statistics, and syllabus chapter CRUD operations with error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm earthy color palette for light and dark modes using CSS custom properties, plus base typography styles.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the application domain models (StudySession, UserSettings, SyllabusChapter) and the ExtendedBackendInterface with all expected backend methods.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including color schemes using OKLCH format, typography with Inter font, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting a study timer app with Pomodoro functionality, listing existing features (authentication, timer, streaks, session history, statistics, syllabus management) and known issues with user account creation not working in production.
